Hero.subtitle: MT5 Expert Advisor
Hero.description: Maximize your profits with our institutional-grade MT5 Gold Scalper. Fully automated, backtested, and optimized for XAUUSD.

Features.f1_desc: Executes trades in milliseconds taking advantage of micro-movements in the gold market.
Features.f2_desc: Each MT5 EA is tied to your account and verified in real-time by our secure licensing servers.
Features.f3_desc: Strict lot sizes and drawdown limits enforced by the server to protect your capital.

Recommendations.title: Optimal Setup Recommendations
Recommendations.desc: For the best trading results and uninterrupted performance, we highly recommend the following setup:
Recommendations.broker_desc: We recommend the Fusion Markets broker for its 0 spreads on major currency pairs and its very low commission of $2 per lot.
Recommendations.vps_desc: Run the EA on a Virtual Private Server (VPS) for 24/7 uptime and lowest latency.
Recommendations.session_desc: For maximum volatility and optimal trades, use this bot during the New York market open.

Performance.title: Tested performance, a consistency-driven approach
Performance.p1: Our Expert Advisor was developed and tested with a clear goal: seeking consistent performance while applying strict risk management.
Performance.p2: During our internal tests and in observed market conditions, our strategy has frequently generated results equal to or greater than $20 USD per day on recommended configurations.
Performance.disclaimer: These results are provided for informational purposes and do not constitute a guarantee of performance. Financial markets involve risks, and results may vary depending on capital, market conditions, broker, order execution, and used parameters.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.art1_p1: These Terms and Conditions (hereinafter "T&C") govern the sale of software licenses for the Expert Advisor "JMEgold Scalper EA" (hereinafter "the Robot" or "the EA") via the Gold Trading Bot website (hereinafter "the Site").
Terms.art1_p2: By placing an order on the Site, the customer (hereinafter "the User") unreservedly accepts these T&C.
Terms.art2_p1: The Site offers the sale of licenses to use an Expert Advisor (EA) for the MetaTrader 5 (MT5) platform, intended for automated trading on gold (XAU/USD).
Terms.art2_l1: Licenses are offered under different plans (Starter, Standard, Pro, VIP) with different maximum lot sizes.
Terms.art2_l2: Each license is linked to a unique MT5 account number.
Terms.art2_l3: Licenses are sold for specific periods (weekly, monthly, semi-annual, annual).
Terms.art3_p1: Prices are indicated in US dollars (USD) and are subject to change at any time. The applicable price is the one displayed at the time of the order.
Terms.art3_p2: Payment is made exclusively in cryptocurrency via our secure payment provider. The license is activated automatically after payment confirmation by the blockchain network.
Terms.art4_p1: After payment validation, the User can download the Robot file (.ex5) from their client area on the Site. Delivery is considered complete as soon as the file is made available in the download area.
Terms.art5_p1: In accordance with the legislation in force regarding digital content, the right of withdrawal does not apply once the software has been downloaded. By downloading, the User acknowledges expressly waiving their right of withdrawal.
Terms.art5_p2: No refunds will be granted after downloading the EA file. In the event of a proven technical malfunction of the Robot, an exchange or license extension may be considered on a case-by-case basis by customer support.
Terms.art6_l1: The license is personal, non-transferable, and non-assignable.
Terms.art6_l2: The User agrees not to redistribute, copy, decompile, or reverse-engineer the Robot.
Terms.art6_l3: Any violation of these conditions will result in immediate license revocation without refund.
Terms.art6_l4: The license is valid only for the MT5 account number registered during purchase.
Terms.art7_p1: Trading on financial markets involves significant risks of capital loss. The Robot is a decision-support tool and does not guarantee any profits. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
Terms.art7_p2: The seller cannot be held responsible for financial losses incurred by the User while using the Robot, regardless of the cause (unfavorable market conditions, misconfiguration, connectivity issues, etc.).
Terms.art8_p1: Technical support is provided to assist with the installation and configuration of the Robot. Support is accessible via live chat on the Site or by email. Support does not cover investment advice or trading recommendations.
Terms.art9_p1: The seller reserves the right to modify these T&C at any time. The applicable T&C are those in effect at the time of the order. The User will be informed of any substantial modifications by email or via their client area.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.sec1_p1: As part of using the Site and our services, we collect the following data:
Privacy.sec1_l3_desc: crypto transaction ID. We do not store any private keys or wallet information.
Privacy.sec1_l4_desc: IP address, browser type, pages visited (for analysis and security purposes).
Privacy.sec2_l1: Create and manage your user account.
Privacy.sec2_l2: Activate and validate your Robot license.
Privacy.sec2_l3: Process your payments and send confirmations.
Privacy.sec2_l5: Improve our services and Site security.
Privacy.sec2_commitment_desc: We never sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial or advertising purposes.
Privacy.sec3_p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction:
Privacy.sec3_l3: Authentication via JWT tokens with automatic rotation.
Privacy.sec4_p1: The Site uses cookies strictly necessary for the service to function (authentication, language preferences). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
Privacy.sec5_p1: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the following rights:
Privacy.sec5_b1_desc: Obtain a copy of all data we hold about you.
Privacy.sec5_b2_desc: Correct any inaccurate or incomplete information.
Privacy.sec5_b3_desc: Request the deletion of your personal data.
Privacy.sec5_b4_desc: Receive your data in a readable and structured format.
Privacy.sec5_p2: To exercise any of these rights, contact us via live chat on the Site or by email at our support address.
Privacy.sec6_p1: Your personal data is kept for the duration of your registration on the Site, then for a maximum of 3 years after account closure, in accordance with legal and accounting obligations.
Privacy.sec7_p1: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated date. In the event of a substantial change, users will be informed via their client area.

Risk.title: Risk Warning
Risk.banner_desc1: Trading in financial markets, including trading gold (XAU/USD) on the foreign exchange market (Forex), involves a
Risk.banner_desc2: . It is possible to lose your entire initial investment.
Risk.sec1_l1_desc: Forex trading uses leverage that can amplify both gains and losses. An unfavorable market movement can result in losses exceeding your initial stake.
Risk.sec1_l2_desc: The price of gold (XAU/USD) is particularly volatile and can experience rapid and unpredictable changes, especially during major economic announcements.
Risk.sec1_l3_desc: Under certain extreme market conditions, it may be impossible to execute orders at desired prices (slippage).
Risk.sec1_l4_desc: Internet connection interruptions, server outages, or MT5 platform malfunctions can prevent the proper execution of orders.
Risk.sec2_l1_desc: The JMEgold Scalper EA is an algorithmic tool. It does not guarantee profits and can generate losses.
Risk.sec2_l2_desc: Past results (including backtest results) are not a reliable indicator of future performance. Market conditions change constantly.
Risk.sec2_l3_desc: The Robot requires a stable internet connection and a VPS (Virtual Private Server) to operate optimally 24/7. Any interruption can lead to unmanaged positions.
Risk.sec2_l4_desc: The Robot was designed for specific market conditions. It may not be suitable for all conditions (strong trends, ranging markets, low liquidity).
Risk.sec3_b1_desc: Only invest money that you can afford to lose entirely.
Risk.sec3_b2_desc: Make sure you understand the mechanics of Forex trading and leverage before using the Robot.
Risk.sec3_b3_desc: Use a demo account before trading live to familiarize yourself with the Robot.
Risk.sec3_b4_desc: Consult an independent financial advisor if you have any doubts about the suitability of this product for your situation.
Risk.sec4_p1: Gold Trading Bot and its directors, employees, and affiliates:
Risk.sec4_l3_bold: not guarantee any return or profit
Risk.sec4_l4_suffix: resulting from the use of the Robot.
Risk.sec4_p2: By purchasing and using the Robot, you acknowledge having read, understood, and accepted the risks described in this document, and you assume full responsibility for your trading decisions.

Footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ Trading Forex and precious metals (gold / XAU/USD) carries a high risk of capital loss. Past performance does not guarantee future results. This software does not constitute investment advice. Only invest funds you can afford to lose.
